/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgame_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libgame_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/game_controller_interface/msg/detail/game_control_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/game_controller_interface/msg/detail/robot_info__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/game_controller_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/game_controller_interface/msg/detail/team_info__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
